source.rtlr_file_note: Upstream mux_type_ours.v is 0 bytes / missing (and the filename is itself typo'd — missing the `4`). Two non-empty candidates exist in the directory: mux_type4_redundancy_improve.v and mux_type4_redundancy_optimzied.v (note the upstream `optimzied` typo); they are byte-identical, so this scaffold uses the `_optimzied.v` variant. Numbers drift from paper in both metrics — likely Yosys-version differences on this trivial design.
